title: Third Eye
wikitext:
[]: Third Eye.             Quote Post by CazMu » Wed Dec 08, 2010 1:13 pm So, I only just noticed it, but its gots to have some kind of meaning. The rejected evangelions appear to have 3 eye holes. GNR also has a 'third' eye during 3rd impact. Ya know the part where the tree on life comes down, and a thrid eye opens up out her forhead. Well do you reckong theres any meaning to this?

[]: Re: Third Eye.             Quote Post by skikes » Wed Dec 08, 2010 1:39 pm CazMu wrote: GNR also has a 'third' eye during 3rd impact.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Dec 08, 2010 1:43 pm The rejected Evas having three eyes may just be a coincidence. The skulls shown in the End of Evangelion's graveyard are shown as having up to seven eyes, so it stands to reason that a few would have three. If I remember, some eastern mythologies/religions use a third eye as a symbol of spiritual enlightenment, or moving to the next stage of spiritual existence. Considering what GNR is doing, it seems like her third eye could be a reference to that. Or it could just be freaky imagery :P

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Dec 08, 2010 1:55 pm As well as casual allusion to mystical notions of a third eye and its associations, it is, as skikes notes, another of Giant Naked Rei's many vulvae .

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Dec 08, 2010 2:09 pm Third eye = unexpected avenue of vision = seeing differently, mystically, etc. = enlightenment/divinity. Which is also why I think that even if Unit 08 isn't literally Unit 01, they're meant to be somehow associated.

[]: Re: Third Eye.             Quote Post by Merridian » Wed Dec 08, 2010 2:39 pm CazMu wrote: GNR also has a 'third' eye during 3rd impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Dec 09, 2010 9:11 am All the prototypes I can remember have 5 eye-cameras.

[]:             Quote Post by CazMu » Thu Dec 09, 2010 4:53 pm Reichu wrote: All the prototypes I can remember have 5 eye-cameras.

[]:             Quote Post by COACH » Sat Dec 11, 2010 11:50 am CazMu wrote: aah crap yeah...my fail....i was kinda high at the time... Seriously, being high while watching the End of Evangelion is one hell of a mind trip. Good though!

GNR also has a 'third' eye during 3rd impact. Ya know the part where the tree on life comes down, and a thrid eye opens up out her forhead. Well do you reckong theres any meaning to this?

[]: Re: Third Eye.
